sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62705" key="leuko/peplos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκό-πεπλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62705.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">white-robed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0294.tlg001:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corinn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope> </bibl>: metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμέρη λ.</foreign>, Lat.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dies albo notandus</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
